arts.ttl: Revealed: Pep Guardiola's four-word parting message to Kyle Walker as Man City captain leaves for AC Milan
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has paid tribute to Kyle Walker after the defender completed a loan move to AC Milan for the remainder of the season.

arts.ttl: Guardiola admits City lack fear factor as Walker completes loan to Milan
arts.sum: Manager says top-four slot this season would be success Kyle Walker says goodbye to fans of ‘incredible club’ Pep Guardiola has admitted Manchester City have lost their fear factor and need to “recover who we are” but backed his team to challenge for honours next season, while Kyle Walker’s loan move to Milan was confirmed. The reigning Premier League champions are fifth in the table and 12 points behind the leaders, Liverpool, before Saturday’s visit of Chelsea after a dismal first half of their title defence. City defeated Chelsea on the opening day of the season at Stamford Bridge but that accounts for one of only two victories over teams in the top nine, the other being a 3-0 home win against Nottingham Forest. arts.ttl: AC Milan Pressing for Bologna’s Riccardo Orsolini
arts.sum: Milan are stepping up their efforts to strengthen the squad after the recent acquisition of Kyle Walker, with a keen focus on bolstering the attacking options. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the club have set their sights on Bologna's winger Riccardo Orsolini. The post AC Milan Pressing for Bologna’s Riccardo Orsolini appeared first on FootItalia.com.
